title: boltonia asteroides var. recognita
intro: Boltonia asteroides var. recognita is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the false aster or white doll's daisy, and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Boltonia asteroides var. recognita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations.
